name: seedline
one_liner: Deterministic seed locking across random, NumPy, and PyTorch; restores prior state on exit.
problem: Every ML/LLM project rolls its own seed_everything and almost-all of them have at least one bug: forgetting numpy.random.seed, forgetting torch.cuda.manual_seed_all, pretending to lock PYTHONHASHSEED post-start, accepting bool as a seed, or mutating global state with no way to undo. A small, honest, scope-limited helper with optional backends is the missing primitive.
